anti_patterns_to_detect.name: Validator Reliance Only
anti_patterns_to_detect.description: Test relies solely on validator/helper without explicit assertions
anti_patterns_to_detect.detection_pattern: Test ends with only helper call, no assert statements
anti_patterns_to_detect.fix_template: Add explicit assertions before validator call

anti_patterns_to_detect.name: Condition-Behavior Mismatch
anti_patterns_to_detect.description: Test setup doesn't trigger the intended behavior
anti_patterns_to_detect.detection_pattern: Config space too small for stop condition, wrong fixtures
anti_patterns_to_detect.fix_template: Align test setup with intended behavior

anti_patterns_to_detect.name: Vacuous Truth Assertion
anti_patterns_to_detect.description: Assertion always passes regardless of behavior
anti_patterns_to_detect.detection_pattern: Assertions like >= 0, != None on always-present fields

anti_patterns_to_detect.name: No Assertions
anti_patterns_to_detect.description: Test has no assert statements at all
anti_patterns_to_detect.detection_pattern: No assert keyword in test function
anti_patterns_to_detect.fix_template: Add appropriate assertions for test purpose

anti_patterns_to_detect.name: Weak Assertions
anti_patterns_to_detect.description: Assertions too weak to catch failures
anti_patterns_to_detect.detection_pattern: Assertions like len(x) >= 0, isinstance without value check
